[{"Name":"Sean Gibson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUAPjiYxBZgWe3rOpQ2J4luFTGRDzQvfN_F49caWgXtUaa0jOg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Outstanding experience from start to finish.

Our project came with a few unexpected changes along the way, but the team handled everything with professionalism and flexibility, keeping the work on budget without compromising quality. The site was kept tidy and well-organized throughout, and communication was always open, honest, and timely.

I really appreciated how they took the time to explain options and offer practical suggestions drawn from their professional experience. Their attention to detail was evident in every stage of the work, and it’s clear they take pride in doing things right.

Highly recommend this team for anyone looking for reliable, skilled professionals who value both craftsmanship and client relationships.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Liz Fradgley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKiRgBwvvI4KvBUpysmzBibRr0YGulZlGoYD8gElyeVh_ePkA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Incredible team and would not hesitate to recommend! I recommend them without any reservations.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sebastian Thomsen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIVLiEpFlKVaMrYUJYSmlDRwsItKfD-sqsDKGkbwDLFnh6AWg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Jack and the Freestone team were really great to work with. Jack and team were very accommodating  to our requests, and worked with us on the budget and worked very closely with us to ensure we were very happy with the final product. We will definitely be asking them to work for us again on future projects!

For our specific project we got quotes from several different businesses and Freestone definitely stood above the rest in how personable they were during the bidding process as well as quoting a more realistic and reasonable price.
